positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a crescent moon and a constellation of whimsical, glowing planets, set against a deep indigo gradient background. The overall style should evoke vintage celestial maps mixed with modern abstract line art. Use a limited color palette of gold foil accents, soft milky white, and sapphire blue. The design must be centrally composed, featuring clean, bold silhouettes of the planetary orbits and zodiac figures. Incorporate delicate, abstract cosmic dust swirls and subtle geometric starbursts. High contrast is essential for print pop. Perfect for single-color screen printing on dark fabric. --ar 1:1
